title: More Menu (Part 1/2)
heading_chain: Staff details of District Inspector of Social education(DISE)
heading: Staff details of District Inspector of Social education(DISE)
section: Staff details of District Inspector of Social education(DISE)
text:
# Staff details of District Inspector of Social education(DISE) | **Staff details of District Inspector of Social education(DISE)** |
| **Sl No** | **Name of Section** | **Name of Section In-charge** | **Name of staffs with Designation** | **Remarks** | | 1 | Overall in-charge of DCPU & child helpline, West Tripura | Sri Somnath Ganchaudhuri, DCPO
Phone: 7002748032 | All the staffs of DCPU, West Tripura | All Protection officers, Counselor, accountant and also CHL should report to DCPO of every matter |
| 2 | File section, Checking Emails | Smt. Rimu Banik, Protection Officer (I.C)
Phone: 8731074630 | Smt. Puja Basak, Data Entry Operator | Data entry operator is also incharge for Mission Vatsalya portal works if data analyst is absent. | | Child care institutions | Arpita Dey, Outreach worker | Outreach worker also coordinates with different anganwadis, prevents child amrraiges and works at field level | | 3 | Non-institutional care: Sponsorship | Smt. Lalhmunmawii, Protection Officer (N.I.C)
Phone: 9862086501 | Smt Puja Routh, Social Worker | Social Workers works at field level, prevents child marriage & also conducts various inspections, SIR & training programs. If one of the staff is absent the other staff will be given incharge. | | Non-institutional care: Treatment | Smt. Yapri Debbarma, Social Worker | | 4 | Non-institutional care: Foster care, adoption | Sri Mitan sarkar,Protection Officer (N.I.C)
Phone: 9862004919 | Sri Uttam Sarkar, Social Worker | Social Workers works at field level, prevents child marriage & also conducts various inspections, SIR & training programs | | Mission Vatslaya portal | Sri Mrinmoy Gon, Data Analyst | Data analyst also scans, xerox different kinds of documents | | 5 | Counseling | Smt.
